summary: A rebroadcast of a CBS News Los Angeles / KCAL TV segment showing bystander phone footage of ICE officers arresting a man inside a medical clinic in Ontario, CA. It carries the news network's lower-third chyron ('MAN ARRESTED INSIDE MEDICAL CLINIC') and an overlaid date/location caption. It is a raw news/TV clip with no music or cinematic styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: MAN ARRESTED INSIDE MEDICAL CLINIC; 7/8 10am Ontario Advanced Surgical Center; CBS NEWS LOS ANGELES; KCAL NEWS; POLICE ICE
